detailed_results.question: Quantas mortes foram causadas por doenças cardiovasculares?

details.ground_truth_normalized: SELECT COUNT(*) AS mortes_cardiovasculares FROM mortes WHERE "CID_MORTE" LIKE 'I%'

predicted_components.where: ( c . "CID" LIKE 'I%' OR c . "CD_DESCRICAO" ILIKE ANY ( ARRAY [ '%card%' , '%miocardio%' , '%vascular%' ] ) ) mo . "CID_MORTE" ;
predicted_components.joins: internacoes i mo . "N_AIH" = i . "N_AIH" cid10 c i . "DIAG_PRINC" = c . "CID"

detailed_results.question: Qual a taxa de mortalidade por município (top 10)?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT i."MUNIC_RES", COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") as internacoes, COUNT(DISTINCT m."N_AIH") as mortes, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT m."N_AIH")::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") * 100, 2) as taxa_mortalidade FROM internacoes i LEFT JOIN mortes m ON i."N_AIH" = m."N_AIH" WHERE i."MUNIC_RES" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i."MUNIC_RES" HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") > 100 ORDER BY taxa_mortalidade DESC LIMIT 10;

detailed_results.question: Quais códigos de procedimento têm maior taxa de mortalidade (top 5)?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT i."PROC_REA", COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") as total_casos, COUNT(DISTINCT m."N_AIH") as mortes, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT m."N_AIH")::numeric / COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") * 100, 2) as taxa_mortalidade FROM internacoes i LEFT JOIN mortes m ON i."N_AIH" = m."N_AIH" WHERE i."PROC_REA" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i."PROC_REA" HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT i."N_AIH") > 100 ORDER BY taxa_mortalidade DESC LIMIT 5;
detailed_results.predicted_sql: SELECT p."PROC_REA", COUNT(mo."N_AIH") AS total_mortes, ROUND(COUNT(mo."N_AIH") * 100.0 / ( SELECT COUNT("N_AIH") FROM internacoes i JOIN cid10 c ON i."DIAG_PRINC" = c."CID" WHERE c."CD_DESCRICAO" ILIKE '%morte%' ), 2) AS taxa_mortalidade FROM mortes mo JOIN internacoes i ON mo."N_AIH" = i."N_AIH" JOIN procedimentos p ON i."PROC_REA" = p."PROC_REA" GROUP BY p."PROC_REA" ORDER BY taxa_mortalidade DESC LIMIT 5;

detailed_results.question: Qual o custo médio de UTI por faixa etária dos pacientes?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN i."IDADE" < 18 THEN 'Menor' WHEN i."IDADE" < 60 THEN 'Adulto' ELSE 'Idoso' END AS faixa_etaria, AVG(u."VAL_UTI") AS custo_medio_uti FROM internacoes i JOIN uti_detalhes u ON i."N_AIH" = u."N_AIH" WHERE i."IDADE" IS NOT NULL AND u."VAL_UTI" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY CASE WHEN i."IDADE" < 18 THEN 'Menor' WHEN i."IDADE" < 60 THEN 'Adulto' ELSE 'Idoso' END;
detailed_results.predicted_sql: SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i."DT_INTER") AS ano, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i."DT_INTER") AS mes, EXTRACT(DAY FROM i."DT_INTER") AS dia, i."IDADE", AVG(ud."VAL_UTI") AS media_custo_uti FROM internacoes i JOIN uti_detalhes ud ON i."N_AIH" = ud."N_AIH" GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i."DT_INTER"), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i."DT_INTER"), EXTRACT(DAY FROM i."DT_INTER"), i."IDADE" ORDER BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM i."DT_INTER"), EXTRACT(MONTH FROM i."DT_INTER"), EXTRACT(DAY FROM i."DT_INTER"), i."IDADE";

detailed_results.question: Qual a correlação entre nível educacional e valor das internações?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT ins."INSTRU" AS nivel_educacional, AVG(i."VAL_TOT") AS valor_medio FROM internacoes i JOIN instrucao ins ON i."N_AIH" = ins."N_AIH" WHERE ins."INSTRU" IS NOT NULL AND i."VAL_TOT" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ins."INSTRU" ORDER BY valor_medio DESC;
detailed_results.predicted_sql: SELECT i."ESPEC", AVG(i."VAL_TOT") AS media_valor_internacao FROM internacoes i JOIN instrucao ins ON i."N_AIH" = ins."N_AIH" GROUP BY i."ESPEC" ORDER BY media_valor_internacao DESC;

detailed_results.question: Quantos casos tiveram VDRL positivo e evoluíram para óbito?
detailed_results.ground_truth_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c."N_AIH") AS vdrl_positivo_obito FROM condicoes_especificas c JOIN mortes m ON c."N_AIH" = m."N_AIH" WHERE c."IND_VDRL" = '1';
